Container.Name: meridian
Container.Overview:
Meridian is a local proxy that converts your Claude Max subscription into a standard Anthropic API endpoint.
Use alongside ShareTab to get ~3-5 second receipt scans instead of ~22 seconds with the claude-sdk provider — at no extra API cost.
SETUP (one-time): 1. On your Unraid host, run: claude login (installs Claude Code CLI if needed) 2. Build the image: docker build -t meridian:local https://github.com/rynfar/meridian.git 3. Add this container in Unraid, pointing the Claude Auth Volume at your ~/.claude directory 4. In ShareTab, set: AI_PROVIDER=claude, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://192.168.1.x:3456, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=x
Meridian reads your existing Claude CLI credentials (~/.claude/) and auto-refreshes tokens. No separate API key needed — uses your Claude Max/Pro subscription.
Container.Description: Local Anthropic API proxy for Claude Max subscribers. Pairs with ShareTab to enable fast receipt scanning (~3-5s) without a paid Anthropic API key. Must be built from source: docker build -t meridian:local https://github.com/rynfar/meridian.git

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Port Meridian listens on. In ShareTab, set ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://192.168.1.x:[PORT]

Config.Name: Claude Auth Directory
Config.Description: Path to your Claude CLI credentials directory on the host (created by 'claude login'). Typically /root/.claude on Unraid.

Config.Name: Listen Host
Config.Description: Interface to bind. Keep 0.0.0.0 so other containers can reach it.

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Sessions
Config.Description: Maximum number of concurrent Claude SDK sessions
